summary: Add Product Screen feature verification - CRITICAL ISSUE: The enhanced Add Product screen (with 16 categories, subcategories, product type toggle, variations) at /app/frontend/app/(main)/(tabs)/products/add.tsx is NOT accessible through the UI. Navigation from My Shop 'Add New Product' button goes to OLD /app/frontend/app/(main)/product-add.tsx instead.

critical.issue: Add New Product navigation goes to WRONG screen - navigates to '/(main)/product-add' (OLD simple add screen) instead of '/(main)/(tabs)/products/add' (enhanced add screen with 16 categories, subcategories, and variations)

integration_issues.issue: Enhanced add.tsx file exists with all requested features (16 categories, subcategories, Simple/Variable product toggle, Weight/Volume/Size/Pack variations) but is NOT reachable through normal UI navigation

action_items: CRITICAL: Update navigation in products/index.tsx line 286 from router.push('/(main)/product-add') to router.push('/(main)/(tabs)/products/add') to use the enhanced Add Product screen
Consider removing or deprecating the old /app/frontend/app/(main)/product-add.tsx file once navigation is fixed
critical_code_review_comments: Enhanced add.tsx exists at products/add.tsx with all requested features but is never navigated to
OLD product-add.tsx has only 11 categories in a grid format (no subcategories)
OLD product-add.tsx has no Product Type toggle (Simple vs With Variations)
OLD product-add.tsx has no variation configuration (Weight, Volume, Size, Pack)
products/_layout.tsx correctly declares add.tsx in Stack, but no component navigates there
